steps.t: Dorgam and Dolenthol ventured into the fortifications to the east to gather more information about the Orcs. You should search for Dorgam and discover…
Dorgam has sent you ahead to locate and assist Dolenthol in the Circle of Wrath. You should find Dolenthol.
With your tasks completed, you should return to Dolenthol.
Damrod can be found in Barad Angarth, in the Circle of Wrath. You should talk to Damrod and apprise him of the situation amongst Gothmog's Orcs.
